title: Fitca Prime

'''Fitca Prime''' was a terrestrial<ref name="AIR" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was the primary world of<ref name="CSWE" /> the [[Fitca system]],<ref name="AIR" /> a part of [[Urce sector/Legends|Urce Space]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Lesser Plooriod Cluster/Legends|Lesser Plooriod Cluster]],<ref name="CSWE" /> which was in turn situated in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Imperial Military/Legends|force]] led by [[High Inquisitor]] [[Mox Slosin]] [[Subjugation of Fitca|subjugated]] the Fitca [[Star system/Legends|system]] and Fitca Prime.<ref name="CSWE" /> During the first [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] support wave during that conflict, Alliance [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Shanda Dok]] was captured, and she was subsequently interrogated by Slosin.<ref name="AIR" /> Between [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], Fitca Prime fell within the borders of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fitca Prime was first mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Fitca system, and therefore Fitca Prime, in grid square L-6.<ref name="TEA" />
